name: TooSim
verdict: Coverage is broad but China pricing is steep — $13.99/GB is 3× the market average

throttlePolicy.notes: No throttling policy found for China plans. Fixed-data plans (not unlimited) so throttling less of a concern, but the per-GB cost makes this a poor value for data-heavy use.

appAccess.notes: Expected via international roaming — unverified by field test

pros: Plans valid up to 180 days — flexibility for long trips
Countdown starts only when first used at destination
Refund offered if eSIM doesn't work and can't be fixed
cons: $13.99/GB for China is roughly 3× Nomad's price for the same data
GFW bypass not independently verified for China
No published throttling or FUP policy
Relatively newer brand — less community testing data
China not prominently featured on homepage — specialist coverage depth unclear
